serialization.rule: recursive sorted-key JSON, no whitespace; arrays keep order; primitives via JSON.stringify. Written by canon.mjs from proposal_raw.json to proposal_canon.json (6716 bytes).

drawRule: seed=SHA-256(proposal_canon.json). Take digest bytes left-to-right b0,b1,... For draw k over an ordered remaining list of the 40 indexed facts, idx = b_k mod remaining.length; pick remaining[idx]; remove it (without replacement).

questions.question: In tigzkp-mage.json's seats array, what algebra and persona does the seat with seatId 'swordsman' carry?
questions.tierProbe: Mechanical/PROVEN: name the re-runnable command that proves the neg∘bnot=succ algebra the seat is bound to → node canon/conform.mjs (the workshop guard).

questions.question: What vertex, glyph, and meaning does anchors.lethae carry in tigzkp-mage.json?
questions.expectedAnswer: vertex 25, glyph 🌘, meaning "structural forgetting; the assay that does not trust memory".
questions.tierProbe: Map §4 row #2 cites this as 'read-directly' (V38⊥V25). Give the exact file+field to read it directly, not a memory restatement.

questions.question: Does the persona/ directory contain folders named agentprivacy-topologist, agentprivacy-cipher, and agentprivacy-algebraist?
questions.expectedAnswer: Yes — all three are present in the persona directory tree.
questions.tierProbe: REPORTED-to-tree: name the authority — the directory tree, not the stale MAPPING.md counts (per frontier.json corpora authority).

questions.question: What is the version field of the city of mages grimoire head?
questions.tierProbe: REPORTED: resolve to the concrete grimoire head file and field, not a remembered version.

questions.tierProbe: REPORTED: resolve to the pool.sith object; do not infer wing from the persona name.

questions.tierProbe: REPORTED: resolve to the facultySpace object and quote the three key/values exactly.

questions.expectedAnswer: "64 gap-sealed held-out points + CSE identity audit + drop-certificate audit + bench 15/15, both tiers".

questions.tierProbe: PROVEN (map §4 row #10 asserts the audit runs and exits 0): name the re-runnable command → node scripts/graph-coherence-audit.mjs.

questions.expectedAnswer: "Compositional Leakage Amplification", conf ~55%; edge C7 → C83 → C17; Home privacy_value_v6_draft.md Part II §II.3.

factIndex: See transcript field for the full numbered F1..F40 index with source paths.
note: proposal_canon.json (the exact hashed bytes) persists in this dir. sha256sum proposal_canon.json MUST equal seedHex. No witness here was suggested by the proposer; all draws derive from the Fiat-Shamir seed over the canonical proposal bytes (T2/GR-4).
